recommendations.title: Ghoulies III: Ghoulies Go to College
recommendations.overview: A college teacher brings the little creatures back to his campus, where they proceed to terrorize the faculty and students.

recommendations.title: Friday the 13th Part VII - The New Blood
recommendations.overview: Tina Shepard, a telekinetic teenage girl, accidentally unchains Jason from his watery grave, allowing him to go on another killing spree in the area.

recommendations.title: Rosemary's Baby
recommendations.overview: A young couple, Rosemary and Guy, moves into an infamous New York apartment building, known by frightening legends and mysterious events, with the purpose of starting a family.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.

recommendations.title: Trolls
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Comedy, Music
recommendations.overview: After the monstrous Bergens invade Troll Village, Princess Poppy, the happiest Troll ever born, and overly-cautious, curmudgeonly outcast Branch set off on a journey to rescue her friends. Their mission is full of adventure and mishaps, as this misma

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.

recommendations.title: Just Like Heaven
recommendations.overview: Shortly after David Abbott moves into his new San Francisco digs, he has an unwelcome visitor on his hands: winsome Elizabeth Masterson, who asserts that the apartment is hers -- and promptly vanishes. When she starts appearing and disappearing at wi

recommendations.title: Infested
recommendations.overview: Residents of a rundown French apartment building battle against an army of deadly, rapidly reproducing spiders.

recommendations.title: Troll Hunter
recommendations.overview: A group of students investigates a series of mysterious bear killings, but learns that there are much more dangerous things going on. They start to follow a mysterious hunter, learning that he is actually a troll hunter.
